violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the alcohol room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher at the bar was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Unapproved insecticide devices were observed at the bars. Insecticide devices to be moved to non-food areas during food service to prevent the contamination of food and food contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The door to the outside, located in the alcohol room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwashers in the bar and kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent the contamination of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The floors in the kitchen, prep room, utility closet upstairs, and alcohol room have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
Chicken was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
